title: cyperus trigynus
intro: Cyperus trigynus, also known as umbrella sedge or umbrella papyrus, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus trigynus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to support immune system function and reduce inflammation. Cyperus trigynus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, or used in traditional remedies such as infusions, decoctions, or salves.
